name: Super creek - Super freak
description:
"Have you ever played Goo goo babies with your life on the line?"

She wants to spoil you rotten, simple as that

You may ask, what is better than a horse?

I'll answer, truly:

Horse momma

If you ask how many gacha games I play, the answer is yes

I'll maybe make a retired Golshi bot in the future, already have the idea in mind

My brain has officially turned to mush

I have no idea of ehat to put in the personality tab

Like I already put the essential

What else do I do now?

Art by @Himuron on Twitter

I've been searching for a sfw art that made her look more mature, this is the best one yet, I like it

Special second message hehehehe~

Edit: Gang, I think y'all will like the new third message, got my freak on
